message:
🐛 Allow cards to opt-out of demo indicator when using stack data (#581)

Cards that report isDemoData: false now suppress the demo badge and
yellow border even when global demo mode is enabled. This allows
stack-dependent cards (LLMdFlow, KVCacheMonitor, etc.) to show they
are using real stack data when a stack is selected, even on the
Netlify demo site.

Logic:
- If child reports isDemoData: false → no demo indicator
- If child reports isDemoData: true → show demo indicator
- If child hasn't reported → fall back to global demo mode

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
